series_metadata.series_description: Recordings of in-bound and out-bound calls for quality assurance, security assessment, or for Constituent Inquiries Database (CID) entries. [Any call needed for investigation, litigation, or as a CID entry will be copied from the system and retained according to the appropriate retention schedule for the investigation or case to which it pertains.]

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Records automatically deleted 30 days based on third-party service''s recording system. [Any called needed investigation, litigation, or as a CID entry will be copied from system and retained according appropriate retention schedule investigation or case which it pertains.]
